title: Junior ImagineerSMP
description: Where you build your true imaginations!
body:
# Where you build your true imaginations!

### We are a group of MC players with some dev experience.
And we want to make our pack easy to acces for al our current and future players to the modpack.

That we are running in our servers so that there will be no mistake wen you start to play with us.

_Its made to have more fun in a **vanilla mc environment**, with some small tweaks._

> 
> **Sodium**, **iris** for running shaderpacks.
> 
> **Xaero world map** for beter navigation.



[< ImagineerSMP Discord >](https://discord.gg/2uU8MsGeTF)

![jun imsmp S3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/718ac10f06acac6153af8741d0d5fe8ccd4e3a2c_0.webp)


**_Please note._**

_You can freely use this pack if you want to._
_Please go to changelog to see the recent updates of the pack_

_Thanks to all mod creators and datapack creators for making these and that we can include these in our own pack._
